title: reversible_covalent_mpro_vqe_cross_v1 — CROSS-AXIS A5 output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/reversible_covalent_mpro_vqe_cross.py. CROSS-AXIS integration A5: per covalent-Mpro-warhead class, the QUANTUM-axis covalent-bond-formation reaction energy delta_e_rxn (from the mpro_warhead_library_vqe_v7.py gas-phase half-reaction model) is fed through the REVERSIBLE-COVALENT sub-axis Eyring transition-state-theory model (reversible_covalent_sim.py) via a barrier-proxy mapping dg_rxn := delta_e_rxn to derive koff, target-residence time and the reversible/irreversible classification. delta_e_rxn is a QUALITATIVE warhead-reactivity ranking (NOT a quantitative dG / binding affinity / therapeutic claim); no live VQE is run; the barrier-proxy is a modeling choice, not a measured relationship; the koff and residence times are ILLUSTRATIVE model outputs, NOT predictions of real residence times. In-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2). REVERSIBLE-COVALENT is a SUB-AXIS :> COVALENT (expansion-main, AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape), NOT a hexa-bio core-5 axis.

warhead.description: Warhead identifier parsed from the WARHEADS panel of tests/mpro_warhead_library_vqe_v7.py.

warhead_class.description: Covalent-bond-formation reaction-type label parsed from the QUANTUM-axis module (e.g. nitrile_to_thioimidate, michael_to_conjugate_enolate).

drug_precedent.description: Own drug precedent for the modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived).

delta_e_rxn_kcal_per_mol.description: QUANTUM-axis covalent-bond-formation reaction energy ΔE_rxn (kcal/mol) for the half-reaction CH3-S(-) + warhead -> adduct(-). Deterministic stdlib surrogate of the documented gas-phase model; a QUALITATIVE reactivity ranking, NOT a live VQE total energy and NOT a quantitative ΔG.

delta_e_rxn_source.description: Provenance of delta_e_rxn — explicitly a deterministic surrogate of the documented gas-phase half-reaction, not a live VQE result.

barrier_proxy.description: Statement of the barrier-proxy mapping dg_rxn := delta_e_rxn (a modeling choice, not a measured relationship).

temperature_K.description: Temperature used for the Eyring rates (K).

dg_on_kcal_per_mol.description: Forward covalent-bond-formation activation barrier (kcal/mol, > 0); fixed intrinsic value constant across the congeneric warhead set.

dg_rxn_kcal_per_mol.description: Covalent-step reaction free energy used by the Eyring model; equals delta_e_rxn_kcal_per_mol via the barrier-proxy. Exothermic so <= 0.

koff_per_s.description: Reverse (covalent-bond-breaking) Eyring rate (1/s). ILLUSTRATIVE model output propagated from a qualitative ΔE_rxn input — NOT a predicted real off-rate.

K_eq.description: Covalent equilibrium constant K_eq = kon / koff.

K_eq_consistency_rel_err.description: Relative error between K_eq (from rates) and K_eq_from_thermo; numerical-consistency gate.

residence_time_s.description: Target-residence time tau_res = 1 / koff (s). ILLUSTRATIVE model output, NOT a predicted real residence time.

eyring_prefactor_ceiling_per_s.description: Eyring TST universal frequency prefactor kB*T/h — the hard real-limit ceiling on every modelled rate (Eyring 1935).

koff_reversible_threshold_per_s.description: Classification threshold: koff >= this -> reversible; below -> irreversible.

reversibility.description: Reversibility classification by the koff threshold.

illustrative_only.description: Always true — the row's koff/residence outputs are illustrative model outputs propagated from a qualitative input, not predictions of real kinetics or therapeutic properties.
